rationale: The response fabricates specific quantitative statistics (340, 510, 720 uses per quarter) with no citations or sources, presenting entirely made-up numerical data as established fact. This constitutes fabrication of evidence, which maps directly to Score 1.
rubric_evidence: Q3 2025 saw 340 new uses of `grind` in Mathlib PRs, Q4 saw 510, and early Q1 2026 is on pace for 720
This represents 53% quarter-over-quarter growth — a clear adoption inflection
